summary: Descriptive overview of remedies in substantive law: expectation, reliance, restitution damages, specific performance.
key_points: expectation is a fundamental concept in contract law.
Legal standards for remedies are established through case law and statutory interpretation.
Courts apply specific tests to determine remedies in litigation.
The doctrine of remedies has evolved through Supreme Court precedents.
Understanding remedies requires analysis of both historical context and modern applications.
philosophy_guard_statement: This fragment describes existing legal doctrines and their applications without advocating for normative changes.
